headline: Kenvue Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
summary: SUMMIT, N.J., April 29, 2026--Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2075 per share on its common stock. The quarterly dividend is payable on May 27, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on May 13, 2026.

headline: Kimberly-Clark Corp (KMB) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Organic Sales Growth Amid ...
summary: Kimberly-Clark Corp (KMB) reports a 3% increase in organic sales growth, while navigating rising oil prices and a distribution center setback.
